title: Regime-Conditional Signal Weighting (Momentum vs Mean-Reversion Gate)
summary: Implement a simple two-state market regime detector (using VIX proxy from yfinance and SPY 200-day MA) that dynamically gates which signal dimensions get amplified. Research clearly shows momentum dominates in low-volatility bull markets while mean reversion is more effective in high-volatility or transitional regimes. Rather than waiting for the backlog HMM Regime Detection (which is more complex), this is a lightweight rule-based gate that can be live in days.
expected_impact: +2-4% win rate improvement by suppressing wrong-regime signals; momentum in bull/low-vol, mean-reversion in bear/high-vol
